name: Zocks
ai_strategy_summary: Zocks is an AI meeting intelligence platform for financial advisors with 5,000+ firms, $65M raised (Lightspeed, QED), and deep integrations into Holistiplan, Commonwealth Financial, Ameritas, and Carson Group.
headline_metric: AI meeting notes live at 5,000+ advisory firms including Ameritas, Carson Group, Kestra; $65M raised
headline_initiative: AI meeting notes, CRM automation, and client intelligence with Holistiplan tax integration

advisor_productivity.headline: Zocks transcribes, summarizes, and automates follow-up for advisor-client meetings across 5,000+ firms
advisor_productivity.detail: Zocks transcribes and summarizes advisor-client meetings, auto-generates CRM notes, follow-up emails, and tasks, integrating with Salesforce, Redtail, and Wealthbox. Partnerships with Commonwealth Financial Network, Ameritas, Carson Group, Kestra, and Osaic. $45M Series B led by Lightspeed and QED (January 2026).
evidence: $65M total raised ($13.8M Series A March 2025 + $45M Series B January 2026)
Enterprise clients: Ameritas, Carson Group, Kestra, Commonwealth, Osaic
advisor_productivity.jpm_implication: Zocks's penetration of major broker-dealer networks (Commonwealth, Osaic) indicates that meeting AI is becoming infrastructure. JPM wealth advisors operating without comparable tools face a productivity disadvantage.

sources.name: Lightspeed Venture Partners — Zocks portfolio (Series B investment confirmed)

operations_compliance.headline: Holistiplan tax data integration transforms meeting intelligence into tax planning action
operations_compliance.detail: Zocks's September 2025 integration with Holistiplan connects meeting notes directly to tax planning data — enabling advisors to act on tax planning opportunities identified during client meetings without manual data transfer.
evidence: Tax data flows from meetings into planning workflows
operations_compliance.jpm_implication: The integration of meeting AI with tax planning data creates a compound productivity gain that point solutions cannot match. JPM's technology stack should enable similar workflow continuity.

sources.name: Zocks — AI meeting intelligence platform for financial advisors
Holistiplan — official site confirming Zocks integration
